payload.answer: Two concurrent writes assert incompatible employment states for Sam. Without timestamps or explicit sequencing, both facts are preserved as potentially valid at different times. User input required to establish: (1) which employment is current, (2) whether this represents a job change, or (3) concurrent roles.
payload.decision: Preserve both facts with temporal ambiguity; flag for user clarification

entity_resolution.reason: Same entity (Sam) with conflicting employment states; temporal ordering unknown; cannot determine which fact supersedes without timestamp or explicit transition context

details: Conflict detected: two incompatible employment facts

No fact deleted to preserve information integrity
